milestone: Stage 4 — Real engine integration via thin adapter
scope: Wire uploaded PitchWise engine + trained WP model into the product without changing the frontend
engine_methodology_status: UNCHANGED — every constant, formula, and hyperparameter preserved
backend_added: engine/core/{wpa_engine.py, ratings_from_wpa.py, win_probability_model.py, ipl_ratings.py} — vendored verbatim
engine/pipeline.py — materializer that runs engine functions on ingested data and persists WPA/ratings/moments/snapshots
data/team_aliases.py — display-only aliases (Delhi Daredevils→Delhi Capitals, Kings XI Punjab→Punjab Kings, RCB Bangalore→Bengaluru, etc.); NOT applied to engine data
backend_rewired: engine/adapter.py — pure Mongo reads projected into contracts; no analytics logic
* list_matches / get_match: read matches with team aliases applied to display only
* stream_balls / get_ball_by_id: project balls docs, ball_id=ball_uid
* get_match_state: momentum from balls.wp_after, top_impact from ratings_snapshots aggregation, team resolved AT MATCH TIME via balls.batting/bowling_team
* get_moments: read moments collection (materialized by pipeline)
* get_rating_breakdown: collect all snapshot components for player up to match_seq
frontend_changes: components/rating/WhySheet.jsx — 2 one-line adjustments: removed placeholder 0.35 scaling from evolution/counterfactual math (weights now arrive in rating-delta space from adapter); threshold guard changed accordingly
pages/Live.jsx — SKIP_TO_DEATH_BALL updated from 108 → 244 (start of KKR over 20; total balls per match is now 250 across both innings, not 120)
verified_via_screenshot: Live page mid-replay (Over 3.4, ball 143/250) — impact board shows CORRECT match-time teams (all GT batters + KKR bowlers)
Momentum chart displays both innings continuously with amber live-head pulse
known_deferrals_for_stage_5: Momentum chart could show a visible innings boundary marker (currently continuous)
Curation UX — 'Skip to finish' currently hardcodes 244 for the Rinku match; needs per-match resolver in Stage 5
V Shankar and other players with name-suffix disambiguation ('Arshad Khan (2)') fall back to name: player_ids (113/591114 = 0.02%)

engine_functions_called_by_pipeline: engine.core.ratings_from_wpa.wpa_to_rating (running snapshots — applying engine's own function per ball)

lint: clean across data/, engine/adapter.py, engine/pipeline.py, routes/ (engine/core/* not touched per directive)
next_stage: Stage 5 — validate every completed feature (Live, Replay, Momentum, Impact Board, WhySheet) end-to-end using the real engine and produce a final visual pass
